title: calea polycephala
intro: Calea polycephala, also known as many-headed cactus marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Calea polycephala include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Calea polycephala can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
